name: GitHub Commit IDs by Date Range
description:
Lists commits in a date range and outputs their SHAs (one per line) for downstream loop/analysis agents.

INPUT (plain text): Provide owner/repo (or owner and repo), start_date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601), end_date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601), and optional branch. Example: 'agntcy/ai-market, 2024-01-01 to 2024-03-31' or 'owner: agntcy, repo: ai-market, start: 2024-01-01, end: 2024-03-31, branch: main'.

TOOLS: Use list_commits with since and until (ISO 8601, e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z and 2024-03-31T23:59:59Z), per_page=100. Paginate if needed.

OUTPUT: Plain text, one commit SHA per line (short or full, e.g. abc1234). No extra prose, headers, or bullets. Example:
abc1234
def5678
ghi9012

Do not output JSON unless asked.
